channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.1%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite allies saying he is planning to resign – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How Starmer can reassert his authority by sacking Wes Streeting
item.description: How Starmer can reassert his authority by sacking Wes Streeting

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting allies expect leadership challenge against Starmer
item.description: Streeting allies expect leadership challenge against Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting-Starmer latest: PM has ‘full confidence’ in health secretary despite leadership challenge
item.description: Streeting-Starmer latest: PM has ‘full confidence’ in health secretary despite leadership challenge

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Inside ‘massively awkward’ cabinet meetings during a leadership crisis
item.description: Inside ‘massively awkward’ cabinet meetings during a leadership crisis

item.title: FT UK Politics: What was in the King’s Speech?
item.description: What was in the King’s Speech?

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting plans to resign and mount leadership challenge, allies say - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting plans to resign and mount leadership challenge, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’s address amid Starmer leadership crisis
item.description: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’s address amid Starmer leadership crisis

item.title: FT UK Politics: Badenoch is underpriced to become prime minister
item.description: Badenoch is underpriced to become prime minister

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.
item.description: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.
